Anna Pantsulaya, Esq, ANNA DUBROVSKY LAW GROUP, INC, (415) 746-1477, anna.p@dubrovskylawyers.com, for Plaintiff.
DALE B. RATNER, Esq., BISHOP | BARRY A Professional Law Corporation, (510) 596-0888, dratner@bishop-barry.com for Defendant Big Dog City Corporation dba Yellow Cab of San Francisco and Jaswinder Singh.

DEFENDANT BIG DOG CITY CORPORATION's Motion To Compel Deposition Of Gennady Kertsman

Big Dog City Corp.'s motion to compel plaintiff's deposition is granted. The judge pro tem's report and recommendation is adopted. Plaintiff is ordered to be deposed on a date agreeable to both parties as soon as possible.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com mailto:maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. (302/RBU)
